quotes.text: Every viral product started as a product that was useful to 10 people. Make those 10 people ecstatic.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your first 100 users should be people you know personally. If you can't convince them, you can't convince strangers.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your indie project's first 100 users are the hardest. The next 900 are easier. Focus on the first 100.
quotes.author: based
